clauses.title: Completed operation must produce an operation accountability statement
clauses.citation_hint: Execution Evidence and Operation Accountability Profile v0.1, clause EEOAP-001.

clauses.title: Statement must bind actor, subject, operation, and timestamp
clauses.citation_hint: Execution Evidence and Operation Accountability Profile v0.1, clause EEOAP-002.

clauses.title: Statement must bind policy, evidence, and provenance references
clauses.citation_hint: Execution Evidence and Operation Accountability Profile v0.1, clause EEOAP-003.

clauses.title: Statement must produce or reference a validator-readable validation report
clauses.citation_hint: Execution Evidence and Operation Accountability Profile v0.1, clause EEOAP-004.

clauses.title: Implementation changes must cite affected EEOAP clauses in task or pull-request summaries
